focus: ATR (Alignment Training Ratchet) — new tier-3 theorem SI #48 introduced, D3 candidate

SI45_CIAP.ontological_types: theoretical (DC#1 game theory), designed empirical (DC#2 adversarial ML), emergent competitive (DC#3 economic markets)
SI45_CIAP.note: Highest-confidence D4 theorem. Meta-theorem: ceiling_TCA and ceiling_GCRSC are CIAP corollaries.

SI47_RCBC.description: RAAI × CIAP conjunction: benchmark score inflation while CA stagnates/degrades. First tier-3 theorem.

SI48_ATR.description: RAAI × AATE conjunction: multi-stage OA-feedback training produces monotone irrecoverable d' degradation. Standard alignment pipeline (SFT→RLHF→RLAIF→CAI) is anti-pattern for introspective self-knowledge. More alignment stages → strictly worse d'. Recovery requires K7.
SI48_ATR.derivation_1: AATE monotonicity per stage × RAAI recovery closure (mechanistic path)
SI48_ATR.derivation_2: RAAI-DPI information-theoretic pipeline × AATE-SDT MI decrease (information-theoretic path)
SI48_ATR.dc1_candidate: AI training literature — comparative self-assessment calibration across SFT-only vs SFT+RLHF vs SFT+RLHF+RLAIF
SI48_ATR.dc3_candidate: Organizational compliance layering — procedural compliance training degrades judgment quality
SI48_ATR.key_corollary: Safety-Self-Knowledge Tradeoff: behavioral safety metrics (harm rate, compliance) can improve while d' degrades — decoupled by OA-calibration structure
